::: {.top-nav}
<span><a href="../index.qmd">home</a></span> 
:::

# reducible error 
Personal writings on an assortment of non-technical, but hopefully interesting, topics I feel partly-qualified to speak on due to my lived experience.

> "It ain't over until the fat lady sings." 
> - [Yogi Berra ](https://www.cmu.edu/dietrich/statistics-datascience/index.html)
